summary: Completed comprehensive testing of crypto AI trading bot focusing on NEW FEATURES: LSTM model persistence, backtesting engine with equity curve/metrics, and auto-trading mode. All 47 backend APIs working (100%), frontend fully functional with real-time updates and pair switching.

minor_issues.issue: Returns empty object when bot is not running - requires bot to be started first
minor_issues.impact: Combined signal data only available when bot loop is active

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 in backtest equity curve

passed_tests: GET /api/market/price returns live BTC price ($66,913.07)
POST /api/lstm/train trains LSTM model and persists to disk (/app/backend/models/)
GET /api/lstm/status returns trained=true after training
POST /api/backtest/run with signal_filter=STRONG returns backtest results (0% return, 0 trades)
POST /api/backtest/run with signal_filter=ALL returns backtest results (1 trade, -0.06% return)
POST /api/backtest/run returns total_return_pct, win_rate, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown_pct, trades array, equity_curve
GET /api/backtest/history returns stored backtest results (5 stored results)
POST /api/auto-trade/enable enables auto-trade for symbol (status: enabled)
POST /api/auto-trade/disable disables auto-trade (status: disabled)
GET /api/auto-trade/status returns enabled status and settings
POST /api/auto-trade/settings updates auto-trade configuration (status: updated)
GET /api/news returns articles from multiple sources (10 articles from CoinDesk)
POST /api/news/analyze returns sentiment analysis (BEARISH sentiment, score: -72, signal: SELL)
GET /api/signal/combined returns weighted signal with breakdown (when bot running)
Frontend BACKTEST button opens backtest panel with settings and RUN button
Frontend AUTO button opens auto-trade panel with enable/disable and settings
Frontend LSTM TRAIN button works and shows MODEL READY after training
Frontend pair switching updates chart and all panels immediately (BTC $66,683 → ETH $2,057)
LSTM model persistence verified - files saved to /app/backend/models/
Backtesting engine working with equity curve and comprehensive metrics
Auto-trading mode with configurable settings (position size, SL/TP, min confidence, cooldown)
All 47 backend endpoints working (100% success rate)
Frontend dashboard fully functional with real-time WebSocket updates
Multi-pair support working for all 8 supported pairs
Combined signal weighting system operational (TA 25%, OrderBook 15%, LSTM 20%, News 20%, AI 20%)
Trade execution system working (SIMULATED status)
Risk management system functional
Alert and notification systems working
News sentiment analysis with GPT-5.2 integration working
AI market analysis with GPT-5.2 working

success_percentage.integration: 100% (all features integrated properly with real-time updates)
